results.title: Vercel
results.description: Vercel is the AI Cloud, a unified platform for building, deploying, and scaling AI-powered applications and agentic workloads.

results.title: Vercel Documentation
results.description: Vercel is the AI Cloud, a unified platform for building, deploying, and scaling AI-powered applications and agentic workloads, as well as modern web applications.

results.title: Vercel
results.description: Vercel's Frontend Cloud provides the infrastructure and developer experience to build, scale, and secure a faster, more personalized web.

results.title: Vercel API
results.description: Vercel API provides a platform for frontend teams to deploy, manage, and scale web applications with a focus on developer experience and end-user performance.

results.title: Vercel Academy
results.description: Vercel Academy provides linear courses to learn Vercel, Next.js, Turborepo, AI SDK, and modern web development to build production-ready applications with the latest features.

results.title: Vercel SDK
results.description: A type-safe TypeScript SDK providing full control over the Vercel platform via the Vercel REST API.

results.title: Vercel
results.description: Vercel documentation.

results.title: Vercel AI Gateway
results.description: Vercel AI Gateway is a unified endpoint that routes requests to multiple AI models and providers, offering observability, authentication, and usage tracking.

results.title: Vercel Storage
results.description: Vercel Storage provides a suite of tools for managing databases, key-value stores, object storage, and edge configuration for applications.

results.title: Vercel Examples
results.description: A collection of demos, starter applications, and best practices for building and deploying projects with Vercel.

results.title: Vercel REST API Reference
results.description: The Vercel REST API provides programmatic access to manage Vercel projects, deployments, domains, and other resources.

results.title: Vercel
results.description: Vercel documentation.

results.title: Vercel AI SDK
results.description: The AI Toolkit for TypeScript. From the creators of Next.js, the AI SDK is a free open-source library for building AI-powered applications and agents

results.title: Vercel Platforms
results.description: A production-ready example of a multi-tenant application built with Next.js 15, featuring custom subdomains for each tenant, tenant-specific content, and Redis for data storage.

results.title: Vercel Edge Runtime
results.description: The Vercel Edge Runtime is a JavaScript runtime environment optimized for edge computing, enabling fast and efficient execution of serverless functions.

results.title: Vercel Sandbox
results.description: Vercel Sandbox allows you to run arbitrary code in isolated, ephemeral Linux VMs, powered by Firecracker MicroVMs and Vercel's build infrastructure.

results.title: Fun
results.description: Vercel Fun is a local development runtime for serverless functions, closely mimicking the AWS Lambda environment for easier testing and debugging.

results.title: Vercel Terraform Provider
results.description: The Vercel Terraform Provider allows users to manage and automate Vercel resources, such as projects, deployments, and domains, using Terraform configuration files.

results.title: Vercel NCC
results.description: Vercel NCC is a simple CLI for compiling a Node.js module into a single file, together with all its dependencies, facilitating minimal package publishing and faster serverless deployments.

results.title: OpenTelemetry for Vercel
results.description: Provides OpenTelemetry integration and utilities specifically designed for Vercel platforms and applications to enable observability.

results.title: Temporal Vercel AI SDK Demo
results.description: A demonstration project showcasing the integration of Temporal workflows with Vercel's AI SDK for building AI-powered applications.

results.title: Vercel AI SDK Letta Provider
results.description: An official provider that seamlessly integrates Letta's stateful AI agents, featuring long-term memory, advanced reasoning, and tool integration, into the Vercel AI SDK ecosystem.

results.title: Maccel
results.description: Maccel is a mouse pointer acceleration driver with a CLI and TUI for easily editing curve parameters, supporting linear, natural, and synchronous acceleration functions.

results.title: Vercel Monorepos
results.description: Vercel Monorepos documentation provides guidance on deploying and managing monorepo projects using tools like Turborepo and Nx on the Vercel platform.

results.title: Vercel AI SDK OpenRouter Provider
results.description: The OpenRouter provider for the Vercel AI SDK contains support for hundreds of models through the OpenRouter chat and completion APIs.

results.title: Volcano Engine Reinforcement Learning
results.description: verl is a flexible, efficient, and production-ready RL training library for large language models (LLMs), supporting diverse RL algorithms and seamless integration with existing LLM infrastructure.

results.title: Vercel BotID
results.description: A minimal Next.js application that utilizes Vercel BotID to protect routes from advanced bots, demonstrating how to implement bot protection in your Next.js app.

results.title: Vercel AI Chatbot
results.description: Chat SDK is a free, open-source template built with Next.js and the AI SDK that helps you quickly build powerful chatbot applications.

results.title: Hazel
results.description: Hazel is an update server for Electron applications that simplifies deployment and provides fast, lightweight updates by leveraging GitHub Releases and Vercel Serverless Functions.

results.title: Vercel AI SDK Gemini CLI Provider
results.description: A community provider for the Vercel AI SDK that enables using Google's Gemini models through the Gemini CLI Core library and Google Cloud Code endpoints, supporting features like streaming, tool calling, and multimodal input.
